headline: Acquire and activate creator UGC videos without paying for them upfront or dealing with product gifting and seeding headaches
subtitle: Leverage the "Amazon Onsite Commission" model by linking creator video to actual sales, and accurately measure creator ROI.

pills.title: Get more UGC without new campaigns
pills.desc: Expand creator content without extra upfront costs.

pills.title: Pay only for real sales
